window_title: OpenAI releases GPT-5 with real-time reasoning - TechCrunch
ocr_text:
OpenAI today announced GPT-5, its most powerful language model to date, featuring real-time reasoning capabilities and a 1M token context window. The model achieves new state-of-the-art benchmarks on math, coding, and scientific reasoning tasks.

The release will be available to ChatGPT Plus subscribers starting next week.
